posts.author: SteveRickwood (Steven Rickwood )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi. I have a location column in board A. I’m mirroring this column along with some others in the sub item section of board B. The problem is for my use case this is then being treated as a mirror column instead of a location column. I need it to be a location column. Does anyone have any suggestions?

Thanks

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @SteveRickwood , what’s the outcome you are trying to achieve? What is it that the mirror isn’t providing for you?
